purpose: add_fact_from_csv's raise_errors=False arms, observed through reasoning (no fact accessor exists): the missing-fact_text and non-numeric-interval-bound rows skip (no beta row anywhere); an invalid start_time ('soon') warns and LOADS with start=0 (gamma [1,1] in every frame); an invalid end_time ('later') warns and LOADS with end=start — NOT the empty-cell default 0 (pyreason.py:1114) — so delta shows a row only in the t=1 frame; the duplicate-name row skips (alpha rides A only, never B); an invalid static cell ('maybe') warns and loads non-static — the skip-vs-load-with-default asymmetry of _parse_and_validate_fact_params, pinned by the filter frames and the node trace's fact names.
provenance: docs/surface.md fn:add_fact_from_csv raise_errors=False arms + malformed-nonint-time end_time half; pyreason.py:1080-1119, :1294-1412 at the pin; screened live 2026-07-12 (4 fresh pin processes, digest-stable); fixture harness/fixtures/facts-warnskip.csv
